name: EURING Code 1966
description: First version of the EURING code system established in 1966 - space-separated format with 11 fields

field_definitions.name: national_spare_columns
field_definitions.description: These spare columns are intended for special studies: e.g. finer geographical divisions, weights and measurements of birds, complicated calculations

field_definitions.name: direction
field_definitions.description: The 360 units are numbered clockwise, 000 (=360) pointing to the North
evolution_notes: Field added manually on 2026-03-18T19:57:01.047339
Manual edit: Edit via PositionalMatrixEditor at 2026-03-18T18:59:06.619Z

field_definitions.name: elapsed time
field_definitions.description: Calculate the number of days and multiply this number by 0.274
evolution_notes: Field added manually on 2026-03-20T17:38:12.219617

field_definitions.name: finding details
field_definitions.description: The circumnstances in which birds are recovered vary greatly and it is impossible to list them all. They involve very different kinds of information
evolution_notes: Field added manually on 2026-03-20T17:41:11.504839

field_definitions.name: coordinates recoveries
field_definitions.description: The geographical co-ordinates of place of recovery given as the usual Greenwich co-ordinates
evolution_notes: Field added manually on 2026-03-20T17:47:06.594784

field_definitions.name: coordinates ringing
field_definitions.description: The geographical co-ordinates of place of ringing given as the usual Greenwich co-ordinates
evolution_notes: Field added manually on 2026-03-20T17:47:54.036367

field_definitions.name: accuracy of date and place recovery
field_definitions.description: accuracy of recovery place: overpunch 1_2 to be used in combination with the other punches and to be indicated by crossing out the appropriate inset square. Accuracy of recovery date: punches 0-9 and 1_1
evolution_notes: Field added manually on 2026-03-20T17:54:29.478705

field_definitions.name: accuracy if date and place ringing
field_definitions.description: accuracy of ringing place: overpunch 1_2 to be used in combination with the other punches and to be indicated by crossing out the appropriate inset square. Accuracy of ringing date: punches 0-9 and 1_1
evolution_notes: Field added manually on 2026-03-20T17:55:16.517797

field_definitions.name: date of finding
evolution_notes: Field added manually on 2026-03-20T18:03:06.632889

field_definitions.name: date of ringing
evolution_notes: Field added manually on 2026-03-20T18:04:01.719278

field_definitions.name: status
evolution_notes: Field added manually on 2026-03-20T18:06:28.901381

field_definitions.name: age (when ringed) & plumage
field_definitions.description:
plumage: overpunch 1_1 is a special indications on moult (to be moulting or in eclipse plumage)
overpunche 1_2 is a bird still in immature or partly immature plumage

age: punches 0-9
evolution_notes: Field added manually on 2026-03-20T18:10:15.517400

field_definitions.name: sex; number of young in nest
field_definitions.description:
Sex: 1_1 male; 1_2 female; no punch sex unknown

Number of young in brood: punches 0-9
evolution_notes: Field added manually on 2026-03-20T18:12:31.212409

field_definitions.name: speed
field_definitions.description: It is no use calculating speeds when the elapsed time is of the order of one year or more, since, during this time, the bird has been in the winter or breeding area: therefore speeds need be calculated only when the elapsed time is less than 0.5 year (code number 0050)
evolution_notes: Field added manually on 2026-03-21T23:23:48.744411

field_definitions.name: distance
field_definitions.description: code number 000 means 0-10 km; code number 001 means 11-20 km; etc
evolution_notes: Field added manually on 2026-03-21T23:23:48.773567

validation_rules.error_message: Species code must be exactly 4 digits
Ring number must be 2 uppercase letters followed by 5 digits
Age code must be a single digit from 1 to 9

validation_rules.rule_expression: len(value) == 8 and value.isdigit() and 1 <= int(value[:2]) <= 31 and 1 <= int(value[2:4]) <= 12
validation_rules.error_message: Date must be 8 digits in valid DDMMYYYY format

validation_rules.rule_expression: len(value) == 5 and value[:-1].isdigit() and value[-1] in ['N', 'S'] and 0 <= int(value[:2]) <= 90 and 0 <= int(value[2:4]) <= 59
validation_rules.error_message: Latitude must be valid degrees (00-90) and minutes (00-59) followed by N or S

validation_rules.rule_expression: len(value) == 6 and value[:-1].isdigit() and value[-1] in ['E', 'W'] and 0 <= int(value[:3]) <= 180 and 0 <= int(value[3:5]) <= 59
validation_rules.error_message: Longitude must be valid degrees (000-180) and minutes (00-59) followed by E or W
Condition code must be exactly 2 digits
Method code must be exactly 1 digit
Wing length must be exactly 3 digits
Bill length must be exactly 4 digits
